(No-mob path @0x7f8a6d: Encode1(0xFE)@0x7f8a6d + Encode4(damage)@0x7f8a76.) The trailing dir byte and the 0xFE no-mob branch BOTH exist on v87 (byte-identical body to v83 @0x7a607a and v95 @0x74b730). v83/v87 identity = owner cid; v95 = m_dwSummonedID. CShopDlg::SetShopDlg.notes: OPEN_NPC_SHOP (NpcShopList). v87 CShopDlg::OnPacket@0x7a290d (nType==0x142) -> CShopDlg::SetShopDlg@0x79e4d0. Decode4(npcTemplateId @0x79e4f4)+Decode2(count @0x79e4fa)+per-commodity loop (while idx<count, no cap). Per item, the EXACT v87 decode sequence is (0x79e527..0x79e5b1): Decode4 itemId + Decode4 mesoPrice + Decode1 discountRate + Decode4 (token field; IDA names it nTokenItemID) + Decode4 period + Decode4 levelLimit + (itemId/10000 in {207,233} ? DecodeBuffer(8) unitPrice double : Decode2 quantity) + Decode2 slotMax. KEY CROSS-VERSION FINDING: v87 carries discountRate(byte)+ONE token int (3 ints total after meso: token/period/levelLimit). v83 had NEITHER discountRate NOR any token int (2 ints after meso). v95 has discountRate + TWO token ints (tokenItemId + tokenPrice = 4 ints after meso). Atlas ShopList.Encode gates WriteByte(DiscountRate) on GMS>=87 and WriteInt(TokenTemplateId) on GMS>=95, then unconditionally writes TokenPrice/Period/LevelLimit. For v87 atlas emits: meso + discountRate(byte) + [no TokenTemplateId, <95] + TokenPrice(int) + Period(int) + LevelLimit(int) = byte + 3 ints — wire layout MATCHES the v87 client byte+3-int read exactly (the single v87 token int is filled by atlas TokenPrice). VERIFIED correct for v87, no atlas change. Analyzer flattens the loop (TOOL LIMITATION, manually verified). Export models templateId+count+one representative non-ammo item.
